label: Object classification
description: Settings for classification models used to refine object labels or state classification.

bird.label: Bird classification config
bird.description: Settings specific to bird classification models.

threshold.label: Minimum classification score required to be considered a match
threshold.description: Minimum classification score required to accept a bird classification.

custom.label: Custom Classification Models
custom.description: Configuration for custom classification models used for objects or state detection.

enabled.label: Enable running the model
enabled.description: Enable or disable the custom classification model.

name.label: Name of classification model
name.description: Identifier for the custom classification model to use.

threshold.label: Classification score threshold to change the state
threshold.description: Score threshold used to change the classification state.

save_attempts.label: Number of classification attempts to save in the recent classifications tab. If not specified, defaults to 200 for object classification and 100 for state classification
save_attempts.description: How many classification attempts to save for recent classifications UI.

objects.label: Object types to classify
objects.description: List of object types to run object classification on.

classification_type.label: Type of classification that is applied
classification_type.description: Classification type applied: 'sub_label' (adds sub_label) or other supported types.

cameras.label: Cameras to run classification on
cameras.description: Per-camera crop and settings for running state classification.

crop.label: Crop of image frame on this camera to run classification on
crop.description: Crop coordinates to use for running classification on this camera.

motion.label: If classification should be run when motion is detected in the crop
motion.description: If true, run classification when motion is detected within the specified crop.

interval.label: Interval to run classification on in seconds
interval.description: Interval (seconds) between periodic classification runs for state classification.
